reasoning: Peer set is dominated by steel/silver/gray helmets with gold accent pieces — a cool-to-neutral temperature band. This prevents confident assessment of outline weight, shadow direction, shadow count, and highlight intensity, all of which appear consistent in the peers but cannot be confirmed on the candidate at this apparent pixel density. Rendering style (pixel art, clean forms) and charm level (small cute item) are acceptably consistent with Denzi family. Proportion penalty waived per item-type rule. Net: style skeleton is Denzi-compatible but palette and scale flags push to marginal.
